description: Fallback smoke suite invoked when test selection is below threshold. Covers core invariants: schema, contracts, system registry, control signals, policy enforcement, eval coverage, replay/lineage, SLO/control behavior.
version_note: v2.0.0 expands from single-file (v1) to multi-file smoke suite covering all canonical gate invariants. The prior single-file baseline (test_eval_dataset_registry.py, 19 tests) is preserved as suite_targets[0].
